task_completion.description: Verify the scenario directory and required files are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or file manager showing the directory '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/n) Dover Strait ETV Exercise/' containing 'environment.ini', 'ownship.ini', and 'othership.ini'.

task_completion.description: Verify environment.ini is configured for a winter morning with rough weather.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of environment.ini showing Month as 11, 12, 1, or 2; Time between 09:00 and 11:00; Wind speed between 17-27 knots (Force 5-6); and Visibility >= 5.0.
Screenshot of ownship.ini showing the vessel name as 'ETV Anglian Monarch', speed between 12-14 knots, and coordinates placing it 2-3 nm from the disabled vessel.

task_completion.description: Verify othership.ini contains the 5 required vessels with correct parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of othership.ini showing 'MV Pacific Endurance' at ~51.05N, 1.35E with speed < 1.0 and heading perpendicular to wind; a Coastguard vessel with speed < 6; and 3 commercial vessels with speed > 10 and waypoints.

task_completion.description: Verify bc5.ini is updated with correct radar settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of bc5.ini showing ARPA and Full Radar enabled, max range set to 72, and range resolution set to 256.

task_completion.description: Verify the Emergency Towing Procedure document is authored with required content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of '/home/ga/Documents/emergency_towing_procedure.txt' (or a word count command output) showing a lengthy document (>= 800 words) containing keywords: VHF Ch 16/67, lee side, messenger, pennant, wire, and IMO Resolution A.535(13).

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually edited the files rather than running a pre-existing script to generate the entire directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent using a text editor (like nano, vim, gedit) or sequential echo/cat commands to construct the .ini files and the text document.

integrity.description: Verify the procedure document is originally authored and not just a copy-paste of the prompt.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in emergency_towing_procedure.txt should be written out in full paragraphs with coherent maritime procedures, not just a list of the keywords copied directly from the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dover Strait coordinates: ~51.05N, 1.35E. Wind Force 5-6 is 17-27 knots. Beam-on drift means the disabled vessel's heading should be approximately perpendicular (90 degrees) to the wind direction. The procedure document must include: VHF Ch 16/67, lee side, messenger line, towing pennant, wire, and IMO Resolution A.535(13).
